LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MORRIS, POLICH & PURDY, LLC AND DOUGLAS WOOD'S DEMURRER TO THE FOURTH AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO BOTH CAUSES OF ACTION. THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INVASION OF PRIVACY IS BARRED BY THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE. THE ONLY CONDUCT OF THE DEMURRING DEFENDANTS THAT COULD SUPPORT LIABILITY FOR INVASION OF PRIVACY IS THEIR ALLEGED TRANSMITTAL OF PLAINTIFFS' TAX RETURNS TO STATE FARM. HOWEVER, AT THE TIME OF THE ALLEGED TRANSMITTAL THE DEMURRING DEFENDANTS WERE REPRESENTING STATE FARM IN ANTICIPATION OF A POSSIBLE LAWSUIT CONCERNING THE CLAIM MADE BY PLAINTIFFS FOR THE FIRE DAMAGE TO THEIR RESIDENCE AND VEHICLE AND THUS THE TRANSMITTAL IS COVERED BY THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE. THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FINANCIAL ELDER ABUSE DOES NOT LIE AGAINST A LAW FIRM AND AN ATTORNEY WHO WERE REPRESENTING AN INSURER THAT ALLEGEDLY FAILED TO PAY INSURANCE BENEFITS DUE TO THE PLAINTIFFS ABSENT ANY ALLEGATION THAT THE LAW FIRM AND THE ATTORNEY PERSONALLY RECEIVED FUNDS THAT WERE WITHHELD FROM THE PLAINTIFFS. BECAUSE IT DOES NOT APPEAR REASONABLY POSSIBLE THAT PLAINTIFFS WILL BE ABLE TO ALLEGE VIABLE CLAIMS FOR INVASION OF PRIVACY OF FINANCIAL ELDER ABUSE AGAINST THE DEMURRING DEFENDANTS, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO BOTH CLAIMS. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dugan Barr of Barr & Mudford LLP telephone number 530-243-8008 for Plaintiffs Dennis Strawn and Diane Strawn.
Gary Hamblet of Morris, Polich & Purdy, LLP telephone number 213-425-5153 for Defendants Morris Polich & Purdy LLP and Douglas Wood.
Stephen Ellingson of Hayes Scott Bonino Ellingson & McLay LLP telephone number 650-637-9100 appeared by telephone for Defendant State Farm General Insurance Company.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling.
Defendants Morris, Polich & Purdy, LLC and Douglas Wood's demurrer to the fourth and fifth causes of action in the complaint is sustained without leave to amend as to both causes of action. The fourth cause of action for invasion of privacy is barred by the litigation privilege. The only conduct of the demurring defendants that could support liability for invasion of privacy is their alleged transmittal of plaintiffs' tax returns to State Farm. However, at the time of the alleged transmittal the demurring defendants were representing State Farm in anticipation of a possible lawsuit concerning the claim made by plaintiffs for the fire damage to their residence and vehicle and thus the transmittal is covered by the litigation privilege. The fifth cause of action for financial elder abuse does not lie against a law firm and an attorney who were representing an insurer that allegedly failed to pay insurance benefits due to the plaintiffs absent any allegation that the law firm and the attorney personally received funds that were withheld from the plaintiffs. Because it does not appear reasonably possible that plaintiffs will be able to allege viable claims for invasion of privacy of financial elder abuse against the demurring defendants, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to both claims. Order signed in open Court.
